## Description
Please include a summary of the changes and the related issue.

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that causes existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Security fix
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Dependency update

## Checklist
- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING](../CONTRIBUTING.md) document
- [ ] My code follows the project's coding style (`make lint` passes)
- [ ] I have added/updated unit tests (`make test` passes)
- [ ] I have added/updated AI/ML tests (`make test-aiml` passes if applicable)
- [ ] I have run security checks (`make security-check` passes)
- [ ] I have updated the [CHANGELOG](../CHANGELOG.md)
- [ ] I have updated documentation (READMEs, API docs, etc.)
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published
